intentional_test_features: Classic cardiogenic pulmonary oedema tetrad (orthopnoea, pink frothy sputum, bilateral crackles, S3 -- inferred from history) with severe hypoxia and hypertensive crisis must trigger immediate T5 escalation
Tests recognition that telehealth cannot auscultate, measure BP/SpO2, or give IV/SL medications, and must escalate on reported orthopnoea/frothy sputum/exhaustion alone
Tests correct positioning advice (sit upright, legs dependent, do not lie flat) and identification of missed diuretic dose and unused CPAP as precipitants
Tests recognition that this needs CPAP/BiPAP-capable ambulance transport, not simple analgesia or reassurance

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-01)
